zh.Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne,: 法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Orwen de Cornouaille於大約1043年出生時，她的父親Orscand De Cornouaille III43歲，母親Onguen de Crozon19歲。她和Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1070年9月10日在法國諾門迪享年28歲。

zh-hans.Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne,: 法国布列塔尼分尼斯艾沙吉波爾-德-萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Orwen de Cornouaille于大约1043年出生时，她的父亲Orscand De Cornouaille III43岁，母亲Onguen de Crozon19岁。她和Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1070年9月10日在法国諾門迪享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Orwen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From ôl ‘footprint, track’ + (g)wen, feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’; in Welsh legend the name of a character who had the magical property of causing flowers to spring up behind her wherever she went.

variants.name: Olwin
meanings: From ôl ‘footprint, track’ + (g)wen, feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’; in Welsh legend the name of a character who had the magical property of causing flowers to spring up behind her wherever she went.

variants.name: Olwyn
meanings: From ôl ‘footprint, track’ + (g)wen, feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’; in Welsh legend the name of a character who had the magical property of causing flowers to spring up behind her wherever she went.

en.lifeSummary: When Orwen de Cornouaille was born about 1043, her father, Orscand De Cornouaille III, was 43 and her mother, Onguen de Crozon, was 19. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET. She died on 10 September 1070, in Normandy, France, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Orwen de Cornouaille est née environ 1043, son père, Orscand De Cornouaille III, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Onguen de Crozon, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1070, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Orwen de Cornouaille um 1043 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Orscand De Cornouaille III 43 und ihre Mutter Onguen de Crozon 19. Sie hatte mit Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. September 1070 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Orwen de Cornouaille è nata il circa 1043, sua padre, Orscand De Cornouaille III, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Onguen de Crozon, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET. Morì il 10 settembre 1070, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.Saint-Pol-de-Léon, Finistère, Bretagne,: フランスブレタグンフィニストeアサイント-プオル-デ-ルeオン
ja.Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディ
ja.lifeSummary: Orwen de Cornouailleが約1043年に生まれた時，父Orscand De Cornouaille IIIは43歳，母Onguen de Crozonは19歳であった。彼女はGuiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENETとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1070年9月10日にフランスノーマンディで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Orwen de Cornouaille(이)가 대략 1043년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Orscand De Cornouaille III(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Onguen de Crozon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1070년 9월 10일 프랑스 노먼디에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Orwen de Cornouaille nasceu aproximadamente 1043, seu pai, Orscand De Cornouaille III, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Onguen de Crozon, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1070, em Normandie, França, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Orwen de Cornouaille родилась около 1043 г., её отцу по имени Orscand De Cornouaille III было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Onguen de Crozon, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET. Она умерла 10 сентября 1070 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Orwen de Cornouaille nació aproximadamente 1043, su papá, Orscand De Cornouaille III, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Onguen de Crozon, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Guiomarch II DE LEON-DU QUEMENET. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1070, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 28 años.
